name: security-superpowers
description: A cybersecurity skill collection for investigations, detection engineering, cloud security, forensics, threat intelligence, and security testing.

interface.shortDescription: Cybersecurity workflows for analysis, hunting, response, and testing.
interface.longDescription: Security Superpowers packages hundreds of cybersecurity-focused Codex skills covering incident response, malware analysis, cloud security, detection engineering, threat intelligence, forensics, vulnerability management, penetration testing, and governance workflows.
defaultPrompt: Triage a security alert, map ATT&CK techniques, and draft response steps.
Hunt across cloud, identity, endpoint, and network logs for compromise.
Analyze malware or forensic artifacts and extract actionable indicators.
